heading: View Database Users
body:
To list all Atlas database users for your project using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas dbusers list [options]

```To return the details for a single Atlas database user in the project you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas dbusers describe <username> [options]

```To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas dbusers list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dbusers-list) and
[atlas dbusers describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dbusers-describe).Related Links* [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

* [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)
